xfail.analyzeString-020: requires schema-validated PSVI type annotation: the built-in fn:analyze-string-result schema types @nr as xs:positiveInteger, but helium leaves the constructed attribute untyped without a compiled schema
xfail.analyzeString-021: requires schema-validated PSVI type annotation: the built-in fn:analyze-string-result schema gives the result element a named complex type, but helium leaves it xs:untyped without a compiled schema
xfail.json-to-xml-016: requires schemaImport/PSVI type annotation: fn:json-to-xml(...,map{'validate':true()}) should validate against the built-in schema so j:number is typed xs:double, but helium leaves it untyped, so data(...) instance of xs:double is false
